candidates.notes: Mobile Eats has product and substrate evidence, but candidate thesis fit is not clear until it is explicitly classified as legacy SMB sharpening or AI-first incubation with SMB owner-operator and problem evidence.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical candidate-fit gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
Candidate clear status requires legacy-SMB sharpening or AI-first incubation classification, SMB owner-operator target proof, problem evidence, and no enterprise/SaaS-generic target drift.
This gate sits before PEEL cash, owner search, POUR, and owner economics; it prevents product/substrate proof from being counted as thesis fit.
next_action: Classify each candidate as sharpen_legacy_smb or incubate_ai_first, attach owner-operator persona and problem refs, and clear any target drift before marking candidate, PRESS, or formation fit clear.
